title: Signature Housewares Ceramic Pet Bowl Set - Food Water Bowls for Dogs and Puppies, Large Cats with Sturdy Metal Stand - Set of 2 6in. Bowls, 32 oz Each
features: Elevated Bowls with Sturdy Stand: Two 6" bowls fits perfectly into the frame. Hard to tip over or push the bowls easily. Reduces food and spilled water on the floor.

Reduce Neck Strain: The rust-proof, powder-coated metal stand elevates the bowls to a comfortable height so that your precious pets could comfortably eat and drink without having to strain their neck down. Food and water can slide down the throat more easily which helps with digestion. The raised bowls can help reduce the pressure on the neck or back especially for pets with arthritis, neck or back problems.

High Quality Stoneware Bowls - Compared with plastic and stainless steel cat bowls, our beautifully glazed stoneware bowls are durable, rust-free and lead-free. The food bowls are easier to wash and clean. Plastic could attract odors and scratch easily. Steel bowls cannot be microwaved. Our bowls are microwave and dishwasher safe.

No-Slip Elevated Decorative Stand: Sturdy design with four rubber casings help keep the stand from moving back and forth, which is stable and strong enough to prevent your pets from knocking over the bowls and keep the feeding area cleaner.

Versatile bowls - The bowls are shallow and wide which makes food easily accessible for your dog or cat. The capacity is 32 oz for each bowl. Use one bowl for food, and the other for water. Wet or dry food is suitable for these smooth finish bowls.
description: Product Description Keep your dog or cat happy and well-fed with the Signature Housewares Set of 2 Ceramic Pet Bowls nestled in a sturdy metal stand. The decorative stand helps to prevent bowls from sliding across the floor or having food spilled. The stand lifts the bowls up off the floor to help the eating position for your pet. The bowls are made of durable stoneware which is easy to clean, dishwasher and microwave safe. The contemparary design with a center paw brings a little fun sophistication to your furry-loved ones' eating area. Directions Fill with Pet feed
